Extinction Chess AlphaZero — Training History
===============================================

Phase 1: Modal (A10G), 200 games, 400 sims — iters 1-24
Phase 2: Cluster (2080 Ti), 200 games, 400 sims — iters 25-55
Phase 3: Cluster (2080 Ti), 400 games, 400 sims — iters 56-73
Phase 4: Cluster (2080 Ti), 400 games, 400 sims, C++ MCTS — iters 74-100
Phase 5: Cluster (2080 Ti), 400 games, 400 sims, C++ batched self-play — iters 101-204
Phase 6: Cluster (RTX 3090), 400 games, 400 sims, C++ batched self-play — iters 205-234
Phase 7: Cluster (2080 Ti), 400 games, 800 sims, LR 0.0001 (10x reduction from 0.001) — iters 235+

Note: In the training log, the "batched self-play: NNNN NN evals" line prints
BEFORE the [iter N] line it belongs to. The NNEvals column maps each count to
the iter line immediately after it in the log.
